name: Haunted Heroes — 16 Animated Dungeon Characters | 16×16 Pixel Art Sprites
description:
**🔥 16 FULLY ANIMATED HAUNTED HEROES — Walk, Idle & Hit Animations Included! 🔥**

Bring your dungeon to life with 16 unique pixel art characters! Each hero comes with walk cycles, idle animations, and hit poses — **120 total animation frames** ready to drop into your game engine.

---

**🎮 THE ROSTER:**
| Character | Rating | Character | Rating |
|-----------|--------|-----------|--------|
| ⚔️ Knight | ★8.9/10 | 👻 Skelet | ★8.2/10 |
| 👹 Demon | ★8.7/10 | 🐉 Chort | ★8.1/10 |
| 💀 Zombie | ★8.6/10 | 🧌 Wogol | ★8.1/10 |
| 😇 Angel | ★8.5/10 | ⛏️ Dwarf | ★8.0/10 |
| 🟢 Orc | ★8.4/10 | 🧝 Goblin | ★7.9/10 |
| 💀 Skeleton | ★8.3/10 | 👿 Imp | ★7.8/10 |
| 🦎 Lizard | ★8.3/10 | 🎃 Pumpkin Knight | ★7.8/10 |
| 👺 Ogre | ★8.2/10 | 🧙 Elf, Wizard + more! | — |

**✨ ANIMATION FRAMES PER CHARACTER:**
- Walk cycle: 4 frames
- Idle animation: 4 frames
- Hit/Death pose: 1 frame
- **= 9 frames × 16 characters + bonus = 120 frames total!**

---

**✅ INCLUDES:**
- 16 unique character sprites (16×16 pixels)
- Walk, idle, and hit animation frames
- Master composite spritesheet for quick preview
- Individual transparent PNGs per character
- **CC0 LICENSE — Use in any project, commercial or personal, no credit required!**

**🎨 STYLE:** 0x72 Dungeon Tileset inspired with Haunted Spectral palette (25 colors)
**🏆 Curator Score: 8.3/10 — Approved with Distinction!**

**💀 Perfect for:** Dungeon crawlers, tactical RPGs, roguelikes, horror games, game jams (Pixel Forge Jam!), and any project needing animated monster sprites.
